summary: Justin teaches a step-by-step process for identifying and building relationships with 3-4 brokers in a chosen market to gain access to off-market deal flow. By touring on-market deals, exchanging business cards face-to-face, and positioning yourself as a serious buyer, you request placement on brokers' off-market/pre-market lists to access deals before public listing.
takeaways: Target 'mom and pop' brokers and smaller complexes under 8-10, 20, 30-unit deals to get direct access to decision-makers like the listing broker, not assistants
Attend property tours in person ('belly to belly, eyeball to eyeball') and exchange business cards to build rapport

After touring, call the broker to follow up, mention your underwritten price (even if significantly lower), acknowledge the gap without criticizing, then ask: 'Do you have any other deals like this that maybe are on market, that are not on market yet?'
Request to be put on broker's email list specifically for 'off-market first look deals' and pre-market opportunities
Build a network of 3-5 brokers in your chosen market to create consistent deal flow from pre-market/off-market sources
Start with on-market deals as leverage to gain credibility and move to off-market deals ('on to off, on to off, step by step')
Establish professional presence with logo, business card, and website so you 'act the part, look the part' as a legitimate real estate investor

skill_candidates.change: Systematically identify and contact 3-4 brokers per market, starting with mom-and-pop firms with smaller assets (under 20-30 units)
skill_candidates.evidence: 'you're going to go find a few properties with three or four different brokers' and 'ideally the more mom and pop folks' to ensure you reach decision-makers directly

skill_candidates.change: Execute the follow-up call script: acknowledge the gap in your offer without criticism, then ask for off-market/pre-market deal access
skill_candidates.evidence: 'listen, I totally understand that. But we are buyers in the market. We're going to buy some deals. We would love to get access. Do you have any other deals like this that maybe are on market, that are not on market yet?'

skill_candidates.change: Attend property tours in person and exchange business cards face-to-face to establish credibility before requesting off-market opportunities
skill_candidates.evidence: 'Get a chance to meet the broker. Exchange your business card with your face, belly to belly' and 'you need to act the part, look the part' to be taken seriously by brokers

title: Lesson 1A: Finding Off Market Deals Via Brokers
